title: Brief #0203 - Rios Business Funding - CEO Content Creation

textRun.content: Brief #0203 - Rios Business Funding - CEO Content Creation
Event Name: Monthly Business Content Creation
Location: Vybe (formerly "The Forum"), 2301 S. Stearman Dr., Chandler, AZ, USA
Specific Instructions: Thomas needs to ask for the Orange Room upon arrival.
Core Goal: To provide consistent, high-quality videography that supports ongoing marketing and brand-building.
Tone/Vibe: Professional, business-focused, and efficient. The aesthetic should reflect a polished corporate identity.
Content Type: Vertical social videos, primarily talking-head style with the CEO, delivered with a high-energy tone and featuring the CEO speaking directly to the camera.
Organized raw footage from each session.
Completion of a detailed footage log for all captured assets

Equipment: One professional camera and one mobile phone (provided by the crew member) to serve as a second angle, lighting, professional audio and sound kit (lapels/shotgun), teleprompter setup (required), and physical printed prompts (must be available on-site).
